name: infinity-bot
description: Infinity WhatsApp Bot V9 — XR Engine + Telegram Panel

scripts.setup: npm install && pip install yt-dlp --break-system-packages 2>/dev/null || pip install yt-dlp
scripts.postinstall: pip install yt-dlp --break-system-packages 2>/dev/null || pip install yt-dlp 2>/dev/null || echo 'yt-dlp install skipped'
